scope: All factual claims introduced in PR #8 (branch: adsense/editorial-value-v1)

claims.claim: Criterion 7 is 'Drawing of lots'
claims.verdict: FALSE
claims.source: FIFA 2026 Regulations, Article on Group Stage Tiebreakers

claims.claim: Disciplinary points: -1 per yellow card, -3 per red card
claims.verdict: UNVERIFIED — specific values not in publicly available FIFA 2026 regulations
claims.correction: Removed specific card point values; prose now describes the system without specifying unverified values

claims.claim: Round of 32 starts 2 July 2026
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: Round of 16 starts 7–8 July 2026
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: Group stage ends 1 July 2026
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: MetLife Stadium is the largest stadium in the United States
claims.verdict: FALSE — contested; Michigan Stadium (107,601) and Beaver Stadium are larger by capacity
claims.correction: Removed the superlative claim; replaced with neutral 'designated final venue'

claims.claim: Group stage ends 2 July 2026
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: Round of 32 begins 2 July 2026
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: MetLife Stadium is the largest stadium in the US
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: Tiebreaker last resort is 'drawing of lots'
claims.verdict: FALSE
claims.correction: Last resort is FIFA/Coca-Cola Men's World Ranking

claims.claim: Canada only qualified for 1986 World Cup
claims.verdict: FALSE — Canada also qualified and participated in 2022 World Cup

claims.claim: Australia reached quarter-finals at 2022 World Cup
claims.verdict: FALSE — Australia reached Round of 16 (lost to Argentina 2-1)

claims.claim: Netherlands vs Japan 2022 R16 rematch
claims.verdict: FALSE — Netherlands and Japan did not meet at 2022 World Cup

claims.claim: Norway last World Cup 2002
claims.verdict: FALSE — Norway's last World Cup was 1998 in France

claims.claim: Sweden missing 2018 World Cup
claims.verdict: FALSE — Sweden participated in 2018 World Cup in Russia

claims.claim: England are in Group B
claims.verdict: FALSE — England are in Group L

claims.claim: US national team plays in Group A
claims.verdict: FALSE — US plays in Group D

claims.claim: AT&T Stadium (Dallas) is an East Coast venue
claims.verdict: FALSE — Dallas is in Texas (Central Time Zone, not East Coast)
claims.correction: Removed Dallas from the East Coast venue list; replaced with Lincoln Financial Field (Philadelphia)

claims.claim: Australia reached the quarter-finals at the 2022 World Cup — their best-ever result
claims.verdict: FALSE — Australia reached the Round of 16 in 2022 (lost to Argentina); also reached R16 in 2006
claims.correction: Changed to 'Round of 16'; removed 'best-ever result' qualifier

claims.claim: bracket_note date '2 Jul 2026' across all 8 languages
claims.verdict: FALSE — group stage ends 27 June, not 2 July
claims.correction: Updated all 8 language bracket_note entries to '27 Jun 2026' (or locale equivalents)

claims.claim: WorldCupMatchDay is funded by Google AdSense advertising
claims.verdict: PREMATURE — AdSense application pending approval; this claim should not appear before approval
claims.correction: Removed 'funded by Google AdSense advertising' from about_p4

claims.claim: MetLife Stadium is the largest stadium in the United States with a capacity of over 82,500
claims.verdict: FALSE — multiple stadiums in the US have larger capacity (Michigan Stadium: 107,601+)
claims.correction: Changed to 'MetLife Stadium has an official capacity of approximately 82,500'

claims.claim: Tiebreaker criterion 7 is 'drawing of lots'
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: Rose Bowl (Pasadena) is a 2026 World Cup venue
claims.verdict: FALSE — the LA-area venue is SoFi Stadium; Rose Bowl is not a 2026 WC venue

claims.claim: Levi's Stadium location listed as 'San Francisco'
claims.verdict: MISLEADING — Levi's Stadium is in Santa Clara, in the San Jose area, not San Francisco

claims.claim: Group stage ends 1 July 2026 / R32 starts 2 July 2026
claims.verdict: FALSE

claims.claim: WorldCupMatchDay is run by a small independent team
claims.verdict: UNVERIFIABLE — 'small team' implies staffing not publicly disclosed
claims.correction: Changed to 'WorldCupMatchDay is an independent fan site'

claims.claim: We aim to respond within 24 hours
claims.verdict: UNVERIFIABLE SLA — cannot guarantee 24h response
claims.correction: Changed to 'We review messages as time allows'

claims.claim: Example 'England vs Scotland, Group B'
claims.verdict: FALSE — England are in Group L, not Group B; Scotland are in Group C, not B
claims.correction: Changed to 'France vs Senegal, Group I'

claims.claim: Advertising is served by Google AdSense
claims.verdict: PREMATURE — AdSense application pending; claim should not appear before approval
claims.correction: Removed the entire AdSense advertising paragraph from Independence Disclosure section

claims.claim: We aim to respond within 24 hours
claims.verdict: UNVERIFIABLE SLA
claims.correction: Changed to 'We review reports and aim to respond as promptly as we can'

claims.claim: Example 'England vs Scotland, Group B'
claims.verdict: FALSE — same as TC-29
claims.correction: Changed to 'France vs Senegal, Group I'

claims.claim: Best third-placed teams ranked by points, goal difference, goals scored only
claims.verdict: INCOMPLETE — FIFA criteria also include disciplinary record and FIFA ranking
claims.correction: Added criteria 4 (disciplinary record) and 5 (FIFA/Coca-Cola Men's World Ranking)
